Cookies agreement

We use cookies to ensure that we give you the best experience on our website.

Necessary cookies

Some cookies are required to provide core functionality. The website might not function properly without these cookies, they are enabled by default and cannot be disabled.

Fastned
_cs_consent•Necessary

Stores the user's cookie consent state for the current domain.

Optional cookies

Allows us to measure the effectiveness of our advertising by understanding the actions that visitors take on our website. For details about the cookies used and the data received see Facebook's Cookie Policy. Cookies placed by Facebook Pixel are subject to Facebook's Cookie Policy.

We use Google Analytics to track visitor behaviour and measure site performance. For details about the cookies used and the data received see Google's Cookie Policy. Cookies placed by Google Analytics are subject to Google’s Cookie Policy.

Enables Apply with LinkedIn feature. The Apply with LinkedIn feature allows you to apply for jobs by using your LinkedIn profile. When you click Apply with LinkedIn on our site, we'll pre-populate some of the job application fields with your profile data and automatically attach your complete LinkedIn profile to the application form. This means that we will be able to easily access your complete LinkedIn profile as we look through your application. For details about the cookies used and the data received see LinkedIn's Cookie Policy. Apply with LinkedIn is subject to LinkedIn's Cookie Policy.

Enables embedded YouTube player feature. For details about the cookies used and the data received see Google's Cookie Policy. Cookies placed by embedded YouTube players are subject to Google’s Cookie Policy.

Open application - Location Acquisition

  • Hybrid
    • Copenhagen, Hovedstaden, Denmark
    • •Milan, Lombardia, Italy
    • •Amsterdam, Noord-Holland, Netherlands
    • •Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germany
    • •London, England, United Kingdom
    • •Paris, Île-de-France, France
    • •Zürich, Zürich, Switzerland
    • •Madrid, Comunidad de Madrid, Spain
    • •Ghent, Oost-Vlaanderen, Belgium
    •
    +8 more
  • Network Development

Job description

Do you want to help expand Fastned’s mission by finding and developing the best locations for high-quality EV charging infrastructure? Even if no vacancy perfectly matches your profile right now, we’d love to hear from you!

Our Network Development team is growing and we’re always keen to meet people with experience in site acquisition, partnerships, or infrastructure projects who want to help shape the future of clean transport.


We’re active in 9 countries (and counting!), so whether your background is in urban planning, real estate, public partnerships, or renewables, your ideas could help us find the perfect spots for our next stations.

What your future team is all about!

At Fastned, our Network Development team leads the charge in building Europe’s best fast-charging network. We scout and secure the most strategic, visible, and accessible locations in high-traffic areas to host our stations. Along the way, we work closely with local authorities, landowners, developers, and partners to deliver a charging experience that’s not only functional but also future-proof.

What we’re looking for

We welcome applications from ambitious graduates as well as seasoned professionals with backgrounds in network development, real estate, or infrastructure. If you're passionate about sustainable mobility and excited by the idea of shaping Europe’s EV charging landscape through smart location choices, we’d love to hear from you!

You might be someone who:

  • Has a sharp eye for spotting the perfect site

  • Enjoys negotiating win-win partnerships

  • Navigates permitting and regulatory processes with confidence

  • Thrives in a fast-moving, purpose-driven environment

We’re especially interested in people who bring:

  • A deal-making mindset and strong commercial acumen

  • Proven negotiation skills, and feel comfortable working with both government authorities and private landowners

  • An understanding of commercial and financial concepts or a strong willingness to learn

  • Excellent communication skills in English, plus bonus points for other European languages

  • A mission-driven attitude: you’re motivated by creating a cleaner, greener world

Whether you're a strategic thinker, a strong relationship builder, or someone who simply loves getting things done, there's a place for you on our team.

What we offer all our employees

We work hard to change the world, but we don't forget to celebrate our successes, big and small. In our offices, Fastned knows how to bring people together!

  • Stock option plan -> We believe in shared value creation;

  • A training and development budget of €3,000 per year per employee, because development and training are important to us, and our sector offers endless opportunities;

  • Next to fun events year-round, we throw notorious Christmas parties and organise an amazing yearly trip abroad with all employees;

  • Other perks include a company EV vehicle, flexible working hours, full travel compensation and the working gear of your choice.

Interested?

Apply now, send us your CV, select a location where you would like to work and explain quickly what type of role you would love to work in. Once we foresee a suitable job opening, we will get in touch with you to have a first chat!

If you have questions or need further information regarding your application, please contact our recruitment team via recruitment(at)fastned.nl

Fastned stands for equity and inclusion. We welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, gender identities, sexual orientations, religions, neurodiversity, disabilities, parental status or any other protected characteristic that makes you unique.
